title: Supreme Court grants bail to man accused of attacking BCI co-chairman in his chamber
description: The Supreme Court on Friday granted bail to a man accused of attacking Bar Council of India (BCI) Co-Chairman and Senior Advocate YR Sadasiva Reddy inside his chamber in Bengaluru. A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta noted that the accused had already spent more than one year in jail and ordered his release subject to stringent conditions being imposed by the trial court.
